name: Codex Runtime Activation Fingerprint and Same-Task Restart
goal: Make IronClaude self-updates verifiably active after a full Codex restart while preserving the same native task, using provider-specific startup fingerprints and a behavioral transition proof.

tasks.name: Capture startup runtime identity and expose it through diagnostics
tasks.description: Add provider-specific immutable startup fingerprint capture, diagnostic wiring, and anti-theatre tests while preserving identity and rollback guarantees.

steps.description: Write runtime-fingerprint and run-diagnostics RED tests covering provider-active manifests, exact SHA-256 values, immutable startup capture, executable expected-runtime verification, explicit failures, structured output, and rollback preservation.
steps.expected: Tests are present before implementation.

steps.description: Run focused RED tests and record exact failures.
steps.expected: FAIL because runtime-fingerprint module and runtime diagnostics do not exist; record exact counts.

steps.description: Implement runtime-fingerprint.ts capture and verifyRuntimeActivation, then thread one startup capture from index.ts through dispatchTool to run_diagnostics with optional expected_runtime and no call-time recomputation or provider fallback.
steps.expected: Codex selects .codex-plugin, Claude selects .claude-plugin, missing/failed capture is explicit FAIL, and exact expected runtime is executable PASS/FAIL logic.

steps.description: Run focused identity, dispatch, diagnostic, and fingerprint tests.
steps.command: npm --prefix worker/mcp-servers/state-manager test -- src/__tests__/runtime-fingerprint.test.ts src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts src/__tests__/session-identity.test.ts src/__tests__/tool-dispatch.test.ts
steps.expected: All selected files/tests pass; health diagnostics report 12/12, matched expected runtime reports 13/13, and stale/mismatch cases mutate no state.

steps.description: Typecheck without emitting per-source dist files.
steps.expected: TypeScript succeeds without writing dist declarations or per-source JavaScript.

steps.description: Bundle only generated state-manager entrypoint.
steps.expected: esbuild writes only dist/index.js containing runtime activation contracts.

steps.description: Stage Task 1 source and tests only.
steps.expected: Exactly Task 1 source/test paths staged; no commit.

tasks.name: Enforce same-task self-update restart and fail-closed recovery contracts
tasks.description: Implement MP-W12 in execution, README, and roadmap contracts so full restart plus same-task reopen is default and new-task handoff is recovery-only.

steps.description: Add RED contract tests for cachebuster-before-build, full process restart, same-task identity, runtime fingerprint, changed:true, fail-closed recovery, and insufficient installation-only evidence.
steps.expected: New contract assertions are present before guidance changes.

steps.description: Run focused RED self-update contract tests.
steps.expected: FAIL on new self-update contract assertions; existing tier-up tests remain green.

steps.description: Update executing-plans, README, and roadmap with narrow self-update boundary and Wave 1R wording.
steps.expected: Same-task reopen is default; new task is recovery-only; no reload subsystem or new workflow surface.

steps.description: Run focused skill, transition, and version contracts.
steps.expected: All selected tests pass with exact count recorded.

steps.description: Check Task 2 whitespace.
steps.expected: No whitespace errors.

steps.description: Stage Task 2 paths.
steps.expected: Exactly Task 2 paths staged; no commit.

tasks.name: Build cachebust validate reinstall and prove same-task runtime pickup
tasks.description: Run full gates, default-cachebust before final build, reinstall locally, fully restart Codex, reopen this task, and verify startup runtime identity before review.

steps.description: Run complete pre-cachebuster state-manager suite.
steps.expected: Complete state-manager suite passes with exact counts.

steps.description: Run complete pre-cachebuster Commander suite.
steps.expected: Complete Commander suite passes with exact count.

steps.description: Validate plugin before cachebuster.
steps.expected: Plugin validation passes.

steps.description: Apply plugin-creator default cachebuster before final build.
steps.expected: One new 1.0.24+codex.<UTC timestamp> version in worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json.

steps.description: Typecheck after cachebuster without emitting per-source dist files.
steps.expected: TypeScript succeeds without writing additional dist paths.

steps.description: Bundle final entrypoint after cachebuster.
steps.expected: esbuild writes only dist/index.js using new cachebuster manifest.

steps.description: Run complete post-build state-manager suite.
steps.expected: Complete state-manager suite passes after final build.

steps.description: Run complete post-build Commander suite.
steps.expected: Complete Commander suite passes after cachebuster/build.

steps.description: Validate plugin after cachebuster/build.
steps.expected: Plugin validation passes after cachebuster/build.

steps.description: Check post-build whitespace.
steps.expected: No whitespace errors.

steps.description: Confirm ironclaude@ironclaude is surfaced from the local repository marketplace.
steps.expected: ironclaude@ironclaude resolves to /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude; otherwise stop.

steps.description: Reinstall from confirmed local marketplace.
steps.expected: Exact new cachebuster installed from /Users/roberthyatt/Code/ironclaude; marketplace files unchanged.

steps.description: Compare exact modified worker source/test/skill/manifest/bundle files with installed cache and record SHA-256 values.
steps.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"),os=require("os"),path=require("path"),crypto=require("crypto");const v=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("worker/.codex-plugin/plugin.json","utf8")).version;const root=path.join(os.homedir(),".codex/plugins/cache/ironclaude/ironclaude",v);const files=[".codex-plugin/plugin.json","mcp-servers/state-manager/dist/index.js","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/runtime-fingerprint.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/index.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tool-dispatch.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/tools/read-tools.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/runtime-fingerprint.test.ts","mcp-servers/state-manager/src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts","skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md"];for(const f of files){const a=fs.readFileSync(path.join("worker",f)),b=fs.readFileSync(path.join(root,f));if(!a.equals(b))throw new Error(`mismatch: ${f}`);console.log(`${crypto.createHash("sha256").update(a).digest("hex")}  ${f}`)}'
steps.expected: Every source/cache pair matches byte-for-byte.

steps.description: Record native task ID, fully quit/relaunch Codex, reopen same task, verify the injected executing-plans skill locator names the new cachebuster, then verify get_resume_state plus run_diagnostics(expected_runtime) before submission.
steps.expected: Same task ID, professional mode on, plan preserved, current skill locator, 13/13 diagnostics including Runtime activation match, and exact startup manifest/bundle hashes and installed root/version/client.

steps.description: Stage manifest and bundle, submit Task 3, and require normal review return transition changed:true.
steps.expected: Task 3 reviewed through normal flow; mark_executing returns changed:true and response is preserved for Task 4.

tasks.name: Record durable live activation evidence and close Wave 1R
tasks.description: Correct prior activation claim and record exact same-task restart, startup fingerprint, parity, diagnostics, transition, test, and no-commit/no-push evidence.

steps.description: Update validation artifact with pre-restart limitation, same-task ID before/after, new cachebuster/root, current skill locator, 13/13 expected-runtime verification, startup hashes, changed:true, parity, and no commit/push.
steps.expected: Evidence distinguishes installation from loaded process and does not claim a new task was required.

steps.description: Run final focused state-manager regressions.
steps.command: npm --prefix worker/mcp-servers/state-manager test -- src/__tests__/runtime-fingerprint.test.ts src/__tests__/run-diagnostics.test.ts src/__tests__/session-identity.test.ts src/__tests__/tool-dispatch.test.ts src/__tests__/workflow-transition-idempotency.test.ts
steps.expected: All selected files/tests pass with exact count recorded.

steps.description: Run final focused Commander contracts and version consistency.
steps.expected: All selected tests pass.

steps.description: Run unstaged whitespace check.
steps.expected: No unstaged whitespace errors.

steps.description: Run staged whitespace check.
steps.expected: No staged whitespace errors.

steps.description: Stage validation artifact.
steps.expected: Validation artifact staged; no commit or push.
